title: The Keeper's Trust
description: Aldric Vane has revealed himself as a member of the Keepers - an ancient order sworn to protect the realm from threats that kingdoms cannot openly acknowledge. For centuries, they have watched from the shadows, guarding secrets that could unmake the world. Now dark forces stir at Willow Dale, an abandoned watchtower that once belonged to the Keepers themselves. Before it fell to ruin, it served as a watchpost against incursions from beyond. Something has awakened there - cultists performing forbidden rites to summon entities from the void. Investigate the ruins, disrupt their ritual, and bring evidence of what you find. Prove yourself worthy of the Keepers' trust.

objectives.description: Travel to the Willow Dale ruins northwest of Dalhurst
Investigate the source of the dark energy
Defeat the cultists performing the ritual
Return to Aldric Vane with evidence of what you found
